message:
fix: Prevent double-free crash during worker cleanup

Add cleanup_started flag to prevent JavaScript destructors from
double-freeing handles after lance_cleanup() has already freed them.

When vitest workers exit:
1. Node.js cleanup hook calls lance_cleanup() first
2. lance_cleanup() sets cleanup_started = true and frees all handles
3. JavaScript GC later runs Statement/Database destructors
4. With this fix, destructors now check cleanup_started and skip
   freeing already-freed handles

This fixes "Worker exited unexpectedly" crashes in CI tests.
